--- Menu Page: https://www.goodasfolk.com/menu ---
Menu - Folk | Natural Wine & Pizza — FOLK
Looking for the best pizza in East Nashville? Folk serves wood-fired sourdough pizza using seasonal ingredients sourced from local farms like Rocky Glade and Harpeth Moon. Whether you're craving a veggie-forward pie or a classic clam pizza, our East Nashville menu delivers flavor and craftsmanship. Ideal for date nights, casual dinners, and food lovers exploring Nashville’s Germantown and beyond.
